name: uilayouts-code-tabs
title: Code Tabs
author: UI LAYOUT
description: Displays one or more caller-provided code samples with accessible tabs, highlighting, and copy controls.

changes: Changed website and root-alias imports to copied local support files.
Removed the branded ui-layouts/shadcn logo branch and retained the generic caller-driven tabs API.
Added a plain-code fallback for Shiki load failures and horizontal overflow for long lines.
Changed the utility import to ../../lib/utils, added a reduced-motion transition class, and normalized formatting.
Replaced the clickable div with a named button, handled clipboard rejection, and cleaned up the reset timer.
Added reduced-motion styling and normalized formatting.
Retained only the upstream cn helper and removed site configuration, URLs, and unrelated timing helpers.

modifications.change: Rewired copied support, removed the branded demo mode, and added highlighting failure and long-line fallbacks.
modifications.reason: Keep one generic component API, remove built-in trademarks, and preserve readable code if optional highlighting fails.

modifications.change: Rewired the copied utility and disabled CSS transitions for reduced motion.
modifications.reason: Make the copied Radix tabs support portable and respect the user motion preference.

modifications.change: Rewired the copied utility, changed the clickable div to a named button, handled clipboard failure, cleaned up its timer, and disabled transitions for reduced motion.
modifications.reason: Make copy keyboard-accessible and prevent stale timers or false success feedback.

modifications.change: Removed unrelated site configuration and timing helpers, retaining cn only.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied support closure minimal and remove site URLs.
